name: fmb-ecosystem
description: Unified production build for the FMB personal website, Yoni, SENZ, and Cognita.

scripts.build: (node --import ./scripts/fetch-shim.mjs scripts/build-ecosystem.mjs > /tmp/fmb-ecosystem-build.log 2>&1 || (tail -n 120 /tmp/fmb-ecosystem-build.log && exit 1)) && node scripts/post-build-entity-copy.mjs && node scripts/fetch-fmb-approved-assets.mjs && node scripts/post-build-network-redesign.mjs && node scripts/post-build-official-withlove-portrait.mjs && node scripts/post-build-network-reception.mjs && node scripts/post-build-network-contact.mjs && node scripts/post-build-exact-asset-paths.mjs && node scripts/post-build-exact-network-assets.mjs && node scripts/post-build-page-style-bundles.mjs && node scripts/post-build-image-dimensions.mjs && node scripts/check-fmb-network.mjs && node scripts/check-fmb-public-brand-routes.mjs && node scripts/audit-fmb-enterprise.mjs && node scripts/audit-fmb-performance.mjs
